description_long: This is a large, multi-structure residential house complex set on a rectangular plot with manicured green lawns and surrounding blacktop roads. The complex consists of several interconnected and detached buildings, each with white or light gray gabled and flat roofs, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The main building features a long, linear facade with a covered porch and large windows, while secondary structures include garages, utility spaces, and smaller residential units. The landscaping includes trees and shrubs, especially near the central courtyard and along the driveways. The property is bordered by paved roads on at least two sides, with driveways providing access to garages and parking areas. The overall design is modern with clean lines, open spaces, and a focus on functionality and community living.
description: A modern, multi-building residential house complex with white gabled and flat roofs, green lawns, and paved driveways, arranged around a central courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building's long facade, covered porch, and landscaped entryway facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the interconnected buildings, garages, and the central courtyard with visible greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrances, utility structures, and additional parking or service areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on secondary buildings, driveways, and the transition between lawn and paved surfaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some continuous glass sections
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, wide doorway, and minimalistic columns, complemented by landscaped plantings.
